meaning: n.阿斗波(拉美、菲律宾等地的一种菜肴,源自西班牙)
examples: They also come canned, usually in adobo sauce.
Instead of making the paste, I make a thinner glaze with canned chipotle and some of the adobo they’re packed in.
Place the garlic, salt, chipotles and adobo sauce, cinnamon, cloves, pepper, broth, orange juice and honey in a blender.
Battered, fried, and flavored with garlicky adobo sauce, it tastes like boneless chicken wings.
New ads show an African-American mother stirring Goya yellow rice and a blonde, blue-eyed mom seasoning chicken with adobo.
